# Plumbing Supplies Dealer Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-plumbing-supplies-plumbing-supplies-dealer
**Vertical slug:** plumbing-supplies
**VN-ID:** VN-COM-CON-004
**Niche family:** NF-COM-CON (variant of electrical-fittings)
**Family role:** variant
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's plumbing supplies market serves a rapidly urbanising population (estimated 220 million) with significant water infrastructure gaps. Products include PVC pipes (½" to 12"), UPVC fittings, PPR pipes, ball valves, gate valves, water pumps, tanks (Polytank, Daewoo), geysers, bathroom fittings, and borehole accessories. Mushin Plumbing Market (Lagos), Enugu Plumbing Hub, and Wuse Market (Abuja) are key distribution centres. SON certifies local pipes and fittings. COREN-registered plumbers recommend suppliers. WhatsApp pipe size/fitting enquiry is the primary first contact.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Plumber Biodun, 34, Lagos**: Sources PVC pipes and fittings for residential plumbing job. Needs correct size and elbows. WhatsApps to confirm stock and price before visit.
- **Estate developer Mrs Adeyemi, 48, Ibadan**: Procuring complete plumbing supplies for 30-unit estate. Needs volume pricing, SON-certified pipes, delivery to site.
- **Facilities manager Yakubu, 40, Abuja**: Maintaining water supply system for government building. Needs gate valves, pump spares, and PPR fittings. Requests technical spec.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (dealer name, "Complete Plumbing Supplies — SON Certified"), WhatsApp stock enquiry CTA, featured products (pipes, fittings, valves, pumps with ₦ pricing), trust strip (SON, CAC, COREN)
- **About**: Business history, sourcing network, SON compliance, delivery capability
- **Products**: PVC/PPR pipes, fittings catalogue, valves, pumps, tanks — all with ₦/metre or unit pricing
- **Contact**: WhatsApp enquiry (primary), location, volume order form (NDPR-compliant)

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Technical, reliable, and quality-certified. "SON-Certified Pipes & Fittings", "Estate Supply Specialists", "COREN-Approved Supplier". Primary CTA: "Check Stock via WhatsApp". Secondary: "Browse Products". Avoid: generic western bathroom imagery.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- SON conformity certification for pipes and fittings
- CAC business registration
- COREN-approved supplier statement
- Volume/estate developer pricing badge
- Delivery to site notice
- Brand display (Nicoll, Georg Fischer, local brands)
- Technical spec availability notice

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Pipe warehouse — stacked PVC pipes by size, Nigerian dealer, well-organised
2. Fitting display — elbow joints, tees, reducers, price-tagged in ₦
3. Plumber sourcing — professional plumber with dealer at counter
4. Estate delivery — pipe bundles being offloaded at Nigerian construction site
5. Water pump display — Grundfos/Pedrollo/local brand pumps, specifications shown
6. Polytank display — various sizes, 500L to 5000L, Nigerian yard setting
7. SON certificate — product conformity document, visible authenticity

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] SON conformity certificate for pipes and fittings
- [ ] CAC business registration number
- [ ] COREN-approved supplier documentation
- [ ] Import duty compliance for foreign fittings
- [ ] NDPR consent on enquiry form

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp stock enquiry CTA prominent
- [x] SON/COREN trust signals
- [x] Nigerian market references (Mushin, Wuse, Enugu Plumbing Hub)
- [x] ₦ pricing per metre/unit
- [x] Borehole, estate, and residential plumbing contexts
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on enquiry form
